zh.lifeSummary: 當Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin於1025年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林時，她的父親King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red-55歲，母親Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney-72歲。她於1054年與King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1076年在她的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭度布林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin于1025年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林时，她的父亲King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red-55岁，母亲Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney-72岁。她于1054年与King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1076年在她的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在爱尔兰度布林。

nameMeanings.name: Ragnhild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + hildr ‘battle’.

variants.name: Ragnild
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + hildr ‘battle’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin was born in 1025, in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland, her father, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, was -55 and her mother, Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney, was -72. She married King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd in 1054, in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1076, in her hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Dublin, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin est née en 1025, à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande, son père, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, avait -55 ans et sa mère, Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney, avait -72 ans. Elle a épousé King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd en 1054, à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1076, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Dublin, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin 1025 in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red -55 und ihre Mutter Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney -72. Sie hat 1054 in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1076 im Alter von 51 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Dublin, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin è nata il nel 1025 nel Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, sua padre, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, aveva -55 anni e sua madre, Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney, aveva -72 anni. Lei sposato King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd nel 1054, nel Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1076, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Dublin, Irlanda.

ja.Dublin, Dublin, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリン
ja.lifeSummary: Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublinが1025年にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンで生まれた時，父King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Redは-55歳，母Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkneyは-72歳であった。1054年にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンでKing Cynan ab Iago of Gwyneddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1076年に故郷で51歳で死去し，アイルランドダブリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin(이)가 1025년 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red(은)는 -55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney(은)는 -72세였다. 그녀는 1054년 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에서 King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1076년 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 드블린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin nasceu em 1025, em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, seu pai, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, tinha -55 anos e sua mãe, Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney, tinha -72 anos. Ela casou-se com King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd em 1054, em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1076, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Dublin, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin родилась в 1025 г. в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия, её отцу по имени King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red было -55 год, а матери, которую звали Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney, -72. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd в 1054 г. в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1076 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности дублинь, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin nació en 1025, en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, su papá, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, tenía -55 años y su mamá, Ingeborg (Ingibjorg) Haakonsdatter (Haakonsdottir) Of Orkney, tenía -72 años. Se casó con King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd en 1054, en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1076, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Dublin, Irlanda.
